items.name: brave browser
items.description:
Privacy-focused browser with built-in ad and tracker blocking.
Blocks most ads and trackers by default without extensions.
Faster browsing with reduced data collection from websites.

items.name: proton mail
items.description:
Encrypted email service that protects messages from third-party access.
Uses end-to-end encryption so only you and the recipient can read emails.
Designed to minimize metadata tracking and improve inbox privacy.

items.name: tutanota
items.description:
Secure email platform with full end-to-end encryption by default.
Focuses on privacy-first communication without ads or data scanning.
Open-source system built to reduce exposure of user information.

items.name: Ghostery
items.description:
Browser tool that detects and blocks hidden tracking scripts.
Shows which companies are tracking activity on each website.
Helps improve privacy and page loading speed by removing trackers.

items.name: ublock origin
items.description:
Lightweight content blocker for ads, trackers, and malicious scripts.
Highly efficient filtering system with minimal performance impact.
Works across most browsers to clean up and secure web pages.

items.name: mullvad
items.description:
VPN service designed for strong anonymity and minimal user data collection.
Does not require personal information or email for account creation.
Encrypts internet traffic and hides IP address from websites and ISPs.
